label: Maximize colonist survival
description: Support as many colonists as possible by building a viable colony.
success_conditions: Colony support capacity maximized at end of mission.

label: Reduce uncertainty and plan
description: Acquire shared and role information, integrate it, and form a workable plan.
success_conditions: Sufficient shared/individual DIK and at least one viable team plan externalization exists.

label: Support 50 civilians
description: Prepare colony to support the first wave of 50 civilians.
success_conditions: Validated colony support satisfies phase 1 target.

label: Support phase 2 population
description: Adapt colony to support 40 civilians and 20 VIPs.
success_conditions: Validated colony support satisfies phase 2 target.

label: Provide shelter
description: Ensure the colony has valid houses with enough capacity.
success_conditions: Validated housing capacity supports target colonists.

label: Provide food
description: Ensure the colony has valid greenhouses and food support.

label: Provide water
description: Ensure the colony has valid water generators and water support.

label: Externalize team plan
description: Create or update a shared artifact representing colony plan or rule integration.
success_conditions: At least one consulted team artifact/whiteboard plan exists.

label: Validate externalizations
description: Check whether whiteboard plans and constructions match current rule understanding.
success_conditions: Relevant artifacts reviewed and validation status updated.

label: Repair incorrect externalizations
description: Revise or repair incorrect constructions or planning artifacts.

label: Acquire missing DIK
description: Inspect packets/artifacts or request information needed for active goals.
success_conditions: Required DIK prerequisites for active goal obtained or delegated.
